challengeFiles.seed:
Nutrition Facts

8 servings per container

Serving size 2/3 cup (55g)

tests.text: Your link elements should be void elements, they should not have an end tag </link>.
Your two link elements should be inside the head element.
Both of your link elements should have the rel attribute set to stylesheet.
One of your link elements should have an href attribute set to styles.css.
One of your link elements should have an href attribute set to https://fonts.googleapis.com/css?family=Open+Sans:400,700,800.

description:
U vaš element head, dodajte element link sa atributom rel postavljenim na stylesheet i atributom href postavljenim na https://fonts.googleapis.com/css?family=Open+Sans:400,700,800.

Ovo će uvesti font porodicu Open Sans, sa vrednostima težine fonta 400, 700 i 800.

Takođe dodajte element link za povezivanje vašeg fajla styles.css.
